name: typespec-driven-sample
description: TypeSpec-driven schema-first development PoC for live-service games

scripts.tsp:compile: docker compose build typespec && docker compose run --rm typespec
scripts.tsp:compile:admin: docker compose build typespec && docker compose run --rm typespec sh -c "npx tsp compile admin/"
scripts.tsp:compile:game-server: docker compose build typespec && docker compose run --rm typespec sh -c "npx tsp compile game-server/"
scripts.nswag:generate: npm run nswag:generate:admin && npm run nswag:generate:game-server
scripts.tsp-and-nswag: npm run tsp:compile && npm run nswag:generate && npm run clean:orphan-entities
scripts.build:frontend: cd admin.frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:all: npm run tsp-and-nswag && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
